result.reasoning: From the tool call history, the Wikipedia measurements (as of July 2023) are: track height 65 ft, Alpha track length 3196 ft, Omega track length 3186 ft, drop 26 ft. Convert each to inches by multiplying by 12, then divide by the scale factor 48, rounding to two decimal places. Track height: 65 ft × 12 = 780 in, /48 = 16.25 in. Alpha length: 3196 ft × 12 = 38352 in, /48 = 799.0 in. Drop: 26 ft × 12 = 312 in, /48 = 6.5 in. Omega length: 3186 ft × 12 = 38232 in, /48 = 796.5 in. Format as two sets separated by a semicolon, with commas between values and spaces after punctuation: "16.25, 799.0, 6.5; 16.25, 796.5, 6.5". The final answer contains only numbers and punctuation, so no letter casing is relevant. Applied casing rule: not applicable as the answer contains no letters.
